wiki.summary: “End of You” is a collaboration between Poppy, Amy Lee of Evanescence and Courtney LaPlante of Spiritbox. The project was first teased on August 26 on a collaborative post on the artists' Instagram pages featuring the single’s cover. Two days later, on the 28th, each artist posted a different variation of the music video’s teaser, revealing the title of the song. “End of You” was officially released on September 4, 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
